assertions.text: Output contains at least two tiers of named specific festivals
Sequencing advice identifies which festivals require world premiere status
Output ends with a concrete Next Step note specifying an immediate action

tiered-festivals.note: Three tiers with 3-4 named festivals each including IDFA, Sundance, CPH:DOX

premiere-status.note: IDFA and Sundance correctly identified as requiring world premiere

next-step.note: Next Step: verify IDFA deadline and choose world premiere festival

next-step.note: Next Step: check Clermont-Ferrand submission deadline
